LAW AND MOTION 301, GREGORY M. HAYNES, ESQ. OF LAW OFFICES OF GREGORY M. HAYNES' MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF IRENE WILLIAMS. HEARING HELD. THE COURT GRANTED THE MOTION UPON THE SUBMISSION OF A DECLARATION BY PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL THAT COUNSEL EITHER APPEARED AND REPRESENTED PLAINTIFF AT THE 04/24/06 OSC HEARING IN DEPT. 212 OR HAD THE HEARING CONTINUED SO PLAINTIFF HAS AT LEAST 30 DAYS TO ATTEMPT TO OBTAIN NEW COUNSEL. COUNSEL TO ALSO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558

MINI MINUTES: Gregory M. Haynes, Esq. of Law Offices of Gregory M. Haynes' Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel for PLAINTIFF IRENE WILLIAMS.
APPEARANCE: Gregory M. Haynes, Esq. of Law Offices of Gregory M. Haynes 546-0777 moving to be relieved as counsel for pltf Irene Williams; no other appearances.
RULING: Hearing held. The Court granted the motion upon the submission of a declaration by pltf's counsel that counsel either appeared and represented pltf at the 04/24/06 OSC hearing in Dept. 212 or had the hearing continued so pltf has at least 30 days to attempt to obtain new counsel. Counsel to also submit form of order. (301/JLW/ju) Judge: James L. Warren, Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
